title: 有馬記念の後に・憧れの先へ

text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki completes the Arima Kinen, and the
stands ring with resonant cheers and applause!

She's overcome with emotion, but she managed
to show her audience a beautiful dream. She bows
respectfully at them and promises that her miracle
will go on.

She's fulfilled her goal of becoming the greatest
entertainer ever.

The curtains close on Fuji Kiseki's show, but the
end is merely another beginning. The start of her
next show will come sooner than we know...
